dependencies: Virgin wood fiber availability and pricing
Recycled fiber supply affected by trade policies and global demand
Energy sources including biomass, natural gas, electricity and fuel oil
Chemical supplies including caustic soda, starch and adhesives
risks: Fluctuations in raw material costs including wood fiber, recovered fiber, chemicals
Energy cost volatility including gas, electricity, fuel oil
Transportation cost increases due to fuel prices and labor availability
Trade protection measures and tariffs affecting recycled fiber supply
Concentration of Global Cellulose Fibers sales in China affected by economic conditions

regulatory_risks: Environmental laws and regulations governing air emissions, water discharges, waste disposal
CERCLA and state environmental remediation requirements
Climate change regulations including GHG emissions reporting and reduction requirements
EU Emissions Trading System (EU ETS) impacts
EU Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive (CSRD)
EU Corporate Sustainability Due Diligence Directive (CSDDD)
EU Deforestation Regulation (EUDR)
State-level GHG reduction programs (California, New York, Virginia)
OECD Pillar Two global minimum tax (15%)
Data privacy laws including EU GDPR, UK GDPR, China Personal Information Protection Law, US state privacy laws
UK Market Abuse Regulation and Disclosure Guidance and Transparency Rules
Sarbanes-Oxley Act compliance requirements
NYSE and LSE listing requirements
Tax law changes and audits in multiple jurisdictions
Labor and employment regulations
Health and safety regulations
Trade policies and tariffs including potential increased US tariffs
Anti-bribery laws including UK Bribery Act 2010 and Foreign Corrupt Practices Act
Economic sanctions by US Treasury Office of Foreign Assets Control
Antitrust regulations including Italian Competition Authority investigations

sanction_risks: Russia sanctions impact from Ukraine conflict (prior Ilim joint venture exposure)
Economic sanctions targeting various countries, persons and entities
Risk of violating sanctions due to existing presence in newly sanctioned jurisdictions
Potential expansion of sanctions programs affecting operations
